mapper.select:
SELECT Z.ZONE_NM AS zoneNm, L.LOC_NM AS locNm, A.AGNT_NM AS agntNm, A.AGNT_CD AS agntCd, M.MTRL_CD AS mtrlCd, M.MTRL_NM AS mtrlNm, S.STOCK_QTY AS stockQty, (ISNULL(S.STOCK_QTY, 0) - ISNULL(S.ALLOCATED_QTY, 0)) AS availQty, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), S.UPDT_TIME, 120) AS lastInDt, S.LOC_ID AS locId, S.WH_CD AS whCd, S.AGNT_CD AS agntCd, S.ZONE_ID AS zoneId, S.CMPY_CD AS cmpyCd FROM TBL_STOCK S WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M L WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.LOC_ID = L.LOC_ID AND S.CMPY_CD = L.CMPY_CD INNER JOIN TBL_WH_ZONE_M Z WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.ZONE_ID = Z.ZONE_ID AND S.CMPY_CD = Z.CMPY_CD INNER JOIN TBL_MTRL_M M WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.MTRL_CD = M.MTRL_CD AND S.AGNT_CD = M.AGNT_CD AND S.CMPY_CD = M.CMPY_CD INNER JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M A WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.AGNT_CD = A.AGNT_CD AND S.CMPY_CD = A.CMPY_CD WHERE S.CMPY_CD = ISNULL(NULLIF(#{cmpyCd}, ''), 'A')
AND S.AGNT_CD = #{agntCd}
AND L.LOC_NM LIKE '%' + #{locNm} + '%'
AND M.MTRL_NM LIKE '%' + #{mtrlNm} + '%'
ORDER BY Z.VIEW_SEQ, Z.ZONE_NM, L.LOC_NM

SELECT LOC_ID AS locId, ZONE_ID AS zoneId, WH_CD AS whCd FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND (LOC_NM = #{toLocCd} OR LOC_CD = #{toLocCd}) -- 명칭/코드 대응 AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DELETED_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_STOCK_MOVE_LOG ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD, FROM_LOC_ID, TO_LOC_ID, MOVE_QTY, MOVE_TYPE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER ) VALUES ( #{cmpyCd}, #{agntCd}, #{mtrlCd}, #{fromLocId}, #{toLocId}, #{transferQty}, 'WEB_MOVE', GETDATE(), #{processUser} )
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TBL_STOCK AS TARGET USING ( SELECT #{cmpyCd} AS CMPY_CD, #{agntCd} AS AGNT_CD, #{mtrlCd} AS MTRL_CD, #{toLocId} AS LOC_ID ) AS SOURCE ON (TARGET.CMPY_CD = SOURCE.CMPY_CD AND TARGET.AGNT_CD = SOURCE.AGNT_CD AND TARGET.MTRL_CD = SOURCE.MTRL_CD AND TARGET.LOC_ID = SOURCE.LOC_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET STOCK_QTY = STOCK_QTY + #{transferQty}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{processUser} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD, ZONE_ID, LOC_ID, STOCK_QTY, ALLOCATED_QTY, WH_CD, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER) VALUES ( #{cmpyCd}, #{agntCd}, #{mtrlCd}, #{zoneId}, #{toLocId}, #{transferQty}, 0, #{whCd}, GETDATE(), #{processUser} );
